title: consolida incana
intro: Consolida incana, also known as the blue forget-me-not or blue larkspur, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Consolida incana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Consolida incana include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
